text:
You were going on an exciting vacation. You finally went where you've always wanted to go.

You went to Venice.

You loved Venice. Especially the narrow streets. You love getting lost there. You adore their incredible architecture. You love the way they paint everything. You love pigeons. You love boats.

You went fording through an Italian street. You couldn Your shoes. Everything is slim fit. You glide over puddles. You slip your ankle.

You hop out onto pavement. You hear a THUD. You're okay though. You walk on. You see a cute café. You go inside.

You order an espresso. You sip it. You imagine yourself taking endless walks along these beautiful streets.

You enjoy your time. You love Venice. You look forward to returning.

You leave. You cherish those memories forever. You can't wait to come back. And maybe next time you'll take more pictures.

You gaze out at another boat. You love boats. You think about going
